g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does a raw record from a BPF ring buffer look like in Go?')
sendPrompt('How do I use binary.Read to decode a packed C struct from a BPF ring buffer in Go?')
sendPrompt('Show me Go code to read /proc/pid/cgroup and extract a Docker container ID')
sendPrompt('Which /proc files give me the most useful metadata for eBPF event enrichment?')
sendPrompt('How do I read /proc/pid/net/tcp to correlate socket state with a PID?')
sendPrompt('What is a good Go pattern for routing eBPF events to different OTLP signal processors?')
sendPrompt('How do I build an OTLP metric from a TCP latency eBPF event in Go using the OTel SDK?')
sendPrompt('How do I reconstruct a distributed trace span from TCP connect and disconnect eBPF events?')
sendPrompt('How do I emit an OTLP log record from a captured execve eBPF event in Go?')
sendPrompt('Show me Go code to send OTLP gRPC from a collector to an OpenTelemetry Collector endpoint')
